parameters.query: SELECT MAX(snapshot_date) AS latest_date FROM creative_snapshots;

WITH latest_snapshots AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (creative_id) *
  FROM creative_snapshots
  ORDER BY creative_id, snapshot_date DESC, id DESC
)
SELECT
  cs.creative_id,
  c.advertiser_id,
  c.advertiser_name,
  cs.status,
  c.first_seen,
  c.last_seen_global,
  cs.became_new_date,
  cs.changed_date,
  cs.became_removed_date,
  snaps.snapshot_date,
  snaps.media_format,
  snaps.images,
  snaps.videos,
  snaps.regions
FROM creative_status cs
LEFT JOIN creatives c ON cs.creative_id = c.creative_id
LEFT JOIN latest_snapshots snaps ON snaps.creative_id = cs.creative_id
WHERE cs.status = 'active'
ORDER BY COALESCE(cs.changed_date, cs.became_new_date, cs.became_removed_date, snaps.snapshot_date) DESC NULLS LAST;

  SELECT DISTINCT ON (creative_id) *
  FROM creative_snapshots
  ORDER BY creative_id, snapshot_date DESC, id DESC
)
SELECT

  c.first_seen,
  c.last_seen_global,
  cs.became_new_date,
  cs.changed_date,
  cs.became_removed_date,
  snaps.snapshot_date,
  snaps.media_format,
  snaps.images,
  snaps.videos,
  snaps.regions
FROM creative_status cs
LEFT JOIN creatives c ON cs.creative_id = c.creative_id
LEFT JOIN latest_snapshots snaps ON snaps.creative_id = cs.creative_id
WHERE cs.status = 'new'
ORDER BY COALESCE(cs.changed_date, cs.became_new_date, cs.became_removed_date, snaps.snapshot_date) DESC NULLS LAST;

WHERE cs.status = 'removed'
ORDER BY COALESCE(cs.changed_date, cs.became_new_date, cs.became_removed_date, snaps.snapshot_date) DESC NULLS LAST;

WITH latest_snapshots AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (creative_id) *
  FROM creative_snapshots
  ORDER BY creative_id, snapshot_date DESC, id DESC
)
SELECT
  cs.creative_id,
  c.advertiser_id,
  c.advertiser_name,
  cs.status,
  c.first_seen,
  c.last_seen_global,
  cs.became_new_date,
  cs.changed_date,
  cs.became_removed_date,
  snaps.snapshot_date,
  snaps.media_format,
  snaps.images,
  snaps.videos,
  snaps.regions
FROM creative_status cs
LEFT JOIN creatives c ON cs.creative_id = c.creative_id
LEFT JOIN latest_snapshots snaps ON snaps.creative_id = cs.creative_id
WHERE cs.status = 'changed'
ORDER BY COALESCE(cs.changed_date, cs.became_new_date, cs.became_removed_date, snaps.snapshot_date) DESC NULLS LAST;

WITH latest AS (
  SELECT MAX(snapshot_date::date) AS latest_date
  FROM creative_snapshots
),
previous AS (
  SELECT MAX(snapshot_date::date) AS previous_date
  FROM creative_snapshots, latest
  WHERE snapshot_date::date < latest.latest_date
)
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT creative_id)::int AS previous_total
FROM creative_snapshots, previous
WHERE snapshot_date::date = previous.previous_date;
